mapper.select: SELECT g.group_id, g.member_id, g.group_name, g.description, g.created_at, COUNT(d.device_id) AS deviceCount FROM ess_device_group g LEFT JOIN ess_device d ON g.group_id = d.group_id WHERE g.member_id = #{memberId} GROUP BY g.group_id, g.member_id, g.group_name, g.description, g.created_at ORDER BY g.created_at DESC
